figures.caption: FIG. 2. Sliding-induced alterelectricity in bilayer Ag2N and FeHfI6. (a),(b) Stacking configurations and corresponding energy landscape of bilayer Ag2N. (c),(d) Stacking configurations and corresponding energy landscape of bilayer FeHfI6. (e),(f) NEB switching barrier and band structures of bilayer Ag2N. (g),(h) NEB switching barrier and band structures of bilayer FeHfI6.
